configurePresets.name: windows-msvc-qt
configurePresets.description: Configure the native CAM workbench with Qt only. Set CAM_QT_PREFIX before using this preset.

configurePresets.name: windows-msvc-qt-occt
configurePresets.description: Configure the native CAM workbench with Qt and Open CASCADE. Set CAM_QT_PREFIX and CAM_OCCT_PREFIX before using this preset.
